sources.note: Maryland Compiled Marriages, Nov 9, 1826, Prince George's MD

notes: 3rd great-grandfather on the Arnold line. Born in Maryland, 1795. Biological parents: Samuel Thomas (1744-1815) and Elizabeth Thomas (1774-1820). Additional parent: Daniel S. Arnold (1768-1849, died in Hampshire County, WV). Mother Elizabeth died July 5, 1820 in Hampshire County, WV. Married Mary Ann Sheriff on November 9, 1826 in Prince George's County, MD. Daughter: Mary Jane Arnold (1836-1909). Died 1855 in Washington DC.
